examples: Community leaders say a complete departmental shake-up is needed.
The Secretary of Education is right to seek a bigger departmental budget.
The point is to use the results of this study to open up meaningful dialogues on implicit gender bias, be it at a departmental level or an institutional level or even a discipline level.
The minister stressed the importance of departmental collaboration, to make the best use of governmental resources.
The British Embassy will administer the grant, which must be spent in line with departmental objectives.
